failures.description: The Researcher made an invalid ProductCatalogSearch call by passing only product_id as integer 0 and omitting the required item_id, instead of calling with item_id "2177997696" and product_id "1968349452".
failures.checklist_reasoning: At index 2, the agent attempted a concrete ProductCatalogSearch invocation with Tool args {"product_id": 0}. The required parameters were already available from index 1: item_id "2177997696" and product_id "1968349452", both as strings. The invocation omitted required item_id and used an integer 0 instead of the required string product_id. At index 3, the tool explicitly returned SchemaError: "catalog.get_details requires string product_id and item_id". This is a malformed tool invocation, not a connectivity, guardrail, or unsupported-intent issue.
